question: What is an accurate statement about a hybrid cloud?

options.B: Allows organizations with common concerns to share the cost of deploying the cloud
options.C: Enables the entire data infrastructure to be controlled by the consumer's IT staff
options.D: Allows an organization to outsource the implementation of a private cloud to a cloud provider

options.A: Consumer has limited control over specific application configuration settings
options.B: Consumer has control over the operating system and deployed applications
options.C: Consumer has control over the configuration settings of the application-hosting environment

question: A start-up company with a limited budget is planning to adopt a hybrid cloud solution for their operations. options.A: Deploy the business-critical applications on an externally-hosted private cloud. Deploy the critical applications on a public cloud

options.C: Deploy the business-critical applications on an on-premise private cloud. Deploy the critical applications on a public cloud
options.D: Deploy the business-critical applications on an externally hosted private cloud. Deploy the less critical applications on an on premise private cloud

question: An organization plans to deploy a new application in their environment. The new application requires 2 TB of storage space. What is the minimum number of disk drives needed to meet the application's capacity and performance requirements given a RAID 0 configuration?
